Isaac Oreoluwa
Open to work

// product designer · Lagos, NG

I design products that drive growth, not just attention.

Businesses hire me when they need more than beautiful interfaces. I help turn complex ideas into products that attract users, keep them engaged, and move key business metrics in the right direction.

Case Studies

Simplifying Community Engagement and Event Discovery

A community-first platform that makes it easier for people to discover local events, connect with their people, and engage beyond the algorithm.

Product · Community ↗

Optimizing Navigation with Side Navs

A navigation redesign focused on improving wayfinding, reducing friction, and helping users move through the product more efficiently. The solution introduces a scalable side navigation system that creates a clearer, more organized user experience.

UX · Navigation ↗

Redesigning Suberra’s Website for Clarity and Conversion

A full website redesign for Suberra — a web3 payments platform. Rebuilt the visual language, information architecture, and brand presence to communicate trust and clarity to a new audience.

Web Design · Brand ↗

Simplifying the Rail Travel Experience

A mobile app design simplifying train schedules, route planning, and ticketing into one seamless experience — built for commuters navigating Nigeria’s rail network.

Mobile · UX ↗

Core Competencies

Product Strategy UX & Interface Design AI Product Design Growth & Conversion Design Design Systems Designer–Developer Collaboration Interaction Design Video Editing
